name: iciba生词本
description: 在iciba.com查词时自动保存生词到生词本

content_security_policy.popup: sandbox allow-scripts allow-popups; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; worker-src 'self' blob:; child-src 'self'; object-src 'self' blob:; script-src-elem 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.gstatic.com https://apis.google.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline';
